titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in Codex Bezae (GA 05)
GA 05
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2000 and 2010.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. Further information about the transcription procedures followed may be found in the electronic edition of the majuscules at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: τοτε in 7.6 moved into 7.5 by David Parker.
Explicit changed by David Parker.
Word break at 8.37 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
* συν ακολουθησαι changed to * συνακολουθησαι, D and s.m. changed accordingly at 13.36 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 18.10 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
Empty word tag deleted at 8.53 by Rachel Kevern.
Number ρνγ changed to three separate words at 21.11 by Rachel Kevern.
Line breaks removed from segs by Catherine Smith.
*ς C* om ιης changed to *σης C*ιης at 11.38 by Rachel Kevern.
incorrect empty line removed towards the end of 118v and remaining lines renumbered accordingly by Catherine Smith.
hand="corrector" changed to hand="C" throughout by Catherine Smith.
Rough breathing reinserted at 8.41 by David Parker.
Tagging for Cs A and K corrected by David Parker.
Word breaks at 6.19, 7.45, 8.4, 43, 12.5, 13.37, changed by David Parker.
Verse breaks at 7.5-6 and 14.16-17 changed by David Parker.
Correction display at 11.49 fixed by Hugh Houghton.
Placement of ab/gap across page boundaries fixed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Fixing of numbers and position of lacuna by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0 with manual adjustments.

ab.note: final stroke of n rescripsit s.m.
deleted first by points above, then by erasure
Line in red with black lines above and below
Line in black with red lines above and below
Followed by αρχεται ευαγγελιον κατα λουκαν with black and red lines above and below
